title: Implementing an Eval Harness for RAG Pipelines
full_text: Most teams building RAG pipelines skip the eval harness entirely...
tldr_bullets: Most RAG teams have no regression harness — they find bugs in prod
A minimal eval suite needs: retrieval quality, answer faithfulness, latency p95

title: Why Most Production Agent Loops Fail
full_text: After reviewing a dozen production agent systems, the failure modes are consistent...
tldr_bullets: Tool call errors compound in multi-step loops without explicit recovery logic
Three most common failure modes: stale context, missing retry, no exit condition

title: Fine-Tuning vs Prompting: A Practitioner's Guide
full_text: The wrong answer to fine-tune vs prompt costs you three months and a GPU bill...
tldr_bullets: Prompting wins for high-variance inputs; fine-tuning for consistent format tasks
Fine-tune ROI break-even is typically > 10k examples and > 6 months deployment

title: pgvector at Scale: Lessons from 100M Embeddings
full_text: Running pgvector at 100M rows taught us several hard lessons about index tuning...
tldr_bullets: HNSW outperforms IVFFlat above 1M rows for p95 latency
Partition by tenant early — retrofitting is painful at scale

title: Claude Sonnet Benchmark Deep Dive
full_text: We ran Claude Sonnet across 12 internal benchmarks covering reasoning and tool use...
tldr_bullets: Sonnet leads on multi-step tool use; competitive on reasoning
Latency p95 is 40% lower than GPT-4o for equivalent tasks in our workload

title: Structured Outputs Are the New API Design
full_text: The best prompt engineers have stopped thinking about prompts and started thinking about schemas...
tldr_bullets: Structured output + Zod schema validation eliminates an entire class of prompt fragility
Treat LLM output contracts like API contracts: version them, test them, own them

title: The Hidden Costs of RAG Chunking Strategies
full_text: Chunking strategy is the most underspecified decision in most RAG implementations...
tldr_bullets: Fixed-size chunking degrades retrieval quality for long-form technical content
Semantic chunking adds 20-40ms per document but improves recall@5 by 15-30%

title: LLM Evals: Contracts Not Scores
full_text: The mental model shift that changed how my team builds LLM systems...
tldr_bullets: An eval is a contract between your system and its behaviour — not a leaderboard score
Evals that fail silently are worse than no evals; instrument failure visibility first

title: Agentic Memory: What Works in Production
full_text: Everyone reaches for a vector store. The teams shipping reliable agents mostly don't...
tldr_bullets: Short-term context + structured state outperforms naive RAG for agent memory
Right memory primitive depends on task horizon: < 10 steps = context, > 10 = external store

title: Multimodal Reasoning with GPT-4o
full_text: We tested GPT-4o's multimodal reasoning across 8 document-understanding tasks...
tldr_bullets: GPT-4o chart understanding outperforms OCR+text pipeline by 22% on our benchmark
Latency doubles vs text-only; acceptable for async document processing, not real-time
